title: Obama joins Texas Senate fight, supports Democrat Talarico
shortDescription: Former President Barack Obama is backing Texas Democrat James Talarico in his bid for a U.S. Senate seat after being spotted in an Austin taco shop.

title: Group behind Epstein, Trump statues back with satire video game on Iran
shortDescription: The Secret Handshake has put up several statues in protest of the Trump administration. Now, they have functional arcade games about the war in Iran.

title: Trump says he’s not considering Americans’ money
shortDescription: President Donald Trump told reporters that Americans' financial situations do not factor into decisions on Iran.

title: Trump says he's not thinking about Americans' finances in Iran talks
shortDescription: President Trump said he's only focused on preventing Iran from building a nuclear weapon, not the war's impact on Americans' financial situations.

title: Trump remarks on departure of FDA's Makary
shortDescription: President Trump would not comment on whether FDA chief Marty Makary was fired or asked to leave.

title: Trump previews talks with Xi as he heads to China
shortDescription: President Donald Trump told reporters that he'll have "a long talk" about Iran with Chinese President Xi Jinping, adding that Xi is a "friend" of his.

title: Gas tax holiday? Trump will have to go through Congress
shortDescription: Sen. Jim Justice, R-West Virginia, said though he's supportive of suspending the roughly 18-cent tax, it's like "taking an aspirin for cancer."

title: Trump says 'Trump Derangement Syndrome' is 'actually a disease'
shortDescription: During an Oval Office event on May 11, President Donald Trump told reporters he believed "Trump Derangement Syndrome" was a real disease.

title: Kash Patel clashes with Senate Dems over FBI budget, drinking claims
shortDescription: Patel faced repeated questions from Democrats about reports of excessive drinking, erratic behavior and misuse of FBI jet, and denied all of it.

title: Virginia GOP lawmaker faces backlash over radio remarks
shortDescription: A Virginia Republican lawmaker is facing backlash after appearing to agree with a racist remark made during a radio interview.

title: Trump takes live audience poll on JD Vance, Marco Rubio for 2028. Watch
shortDescription: President Donald Trump was speaking at the Rose Garden Club Dinner when he asked the audience to cheer for JD Vance or Marco Rubio for the 2028 ticket.

title: Pete Hegseth testifies before House committee
shortDescription: The Pentagon increased its estimated cost of the war in Iran to $29 billion up from $25 billion.

title: Cornyn flips position as Trump, Talarico agree on federal gas tax pause
shortDescription: President Trump, a Democratic Senate candidate, and a Republican senator align on pausing the federal gas tax amid high prices.

title: Trump puts Vance against Rubio in impromptu poll
shortDescription: At a dinner in the Rose Garden, President Donald Trump asked guests to pick between JD Vance and Marco Rubio for a 2028 candidate.

title: Trump sets date for medical exam, his fourth checkup since last year
shortDescription: President Donald Trump is set to receive annual medical and dental examinations on May 26, his fourth visit to medical experts in his second term.

title: Trump takes jab at Pritzker's weight with AI Truth Social post
shortDescription: Donald Trump took to social media to mock JB Pritzker's weight with an AI-generated picture. Here's what he said.

title: Pentagon increases cost of war in Iran to $29 billion: Live updates
shortDescription: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said the US has a plan to escalate the war in Iran "if necessary" as the Pentagon raised the war's cost to $29 billion.

title: Trump nominates Kari Lake as US ambassador to Jamaica
shortDescription: Former broadcaster Kari Lake has no known diplomacy background and faces Senate confirmation to her latest post in the Trump administration.

title: ATF takes fewer gun shop licenses, reversing Biden-era trend
shortDescription: The ATF revoked 56 gun shop licenses in 2025. That's compared to 183 revocations in 2024 under President Biden's "zero tolerance" policy.

title: Are Nebraska Senate Democratic candidates trying to 'trick' voters?
shortDescription: The Democratic primary is an unusual proxy battle due to the general election between GOP Sen. Pete Ricketts and independent populist Dan Osborn.

title: 'Obsessed.' Comey says Trump DOJ may try to indict him a third time
shortDescription: Former FBI Director James Comey said Trump's Justice Department may try to prosecute him a third time if its current case crumbles.
